title: Triund Ridge
journal: Wind at the ridge felt like a clean compiler — stripping noise. We started before dawn, watched the Dhauladhar catch first light, and learned that the best conversations happen at slow altitudes.
memories: Tea with strangers who became trail friends
Clouds rolling below the ridge like soft code deploys

title: Spiti Light
journal: High desert geometry. Monasteries holding centuries. Roads that teach patience. Spiti is where photography stopped being about gear and became about waiting.
memories: Star fields that made the laptop feel small
Butter tea after a long dust day

title: Coorg Rain
journal: Monsoon greens, coffee estates, and the kind of rain that forces rest. A soft reset between hard sprints.
